value: Longquan Mountain Urban Forest Park is part of Chengdu's ambitious 2035 Urban Plan to create a major ecological corridor east of the city. The core managed forest (500 ha representative zone) features naturally regenerating subtropical broadleaf species on former agricultural and marginal land. Key challenges include managing successional dynamics with invasive Mikania micrantha and Lantana camara
units: low sunlight due to basin cloud cover reducing management effectiveness
detail: and balancing conservation with increasing visitor pressure as the park matures.
